name: athenaeum-populi-hugo
description: Hugo build of Athenaeum Populi. Dependency list is deliberately tiny — this migration exists to cure dependency churn (MIGRATION.md). Do NOT add deps beyond these without recording why in MIGRATION-STATUS.

scripts.build: npm run build:hugo && npm run search:index
scripts.check:build: npm run check:routes && npm run check:links && npm run check:search && npm run audit:build
scripts.ci: npm test && npm run build && npm run check:build
scripts.test: node assets/js/lib/check-answer.test.mjs && node assets/js/lib/check-graph.test.mjs && npm run validate && npm run lint

//deps: esbuild is NOT listed: Hugo Pipes js.Build embeds esbuild. katex/mathlive/pagefind are pinned: KaTeX assets are vendored for offline builds, MathLive supplies math input, and Pagefind builds one global site-wide search index.
//versions: katex is pinned to 0.16.22 because that is the KaTeX embedded in the Hugo binary (0.164.0) that renders build-time math via transform.ToMath — the CSS/JS must match the HTML that engine emits, or fractions/roots mis-position. This overrides the old site's 0.16.47. mathlive + @cortex-js/compute-engine match the old site (parent package.json) EXACTLY — the grading equivalence ladder is compute-engine-version-sensitive. Do not upgrade mid-migration.
